scripts.check: turbo run build typecheck lint test //#format:check
scripts.generate:openapi:clips: DOTNET_SKIP_FIRST_TIME_EXPERIENCE=1 DOTNET_CLI_HOME=/tmp DOTNET_CLI_TELEMETRY_OPTOUT=1 ASPNETCORE_ENVIRONMENT=OpenApi dotnet build services/clips/api/Nucleus.Clips.csproj /p:OpenApiGenerateDocumentsOnBuild=true /p:OpenApiDocumentsDirectory=$PWD/packages/clips-api-client --disable-build-servers
scripts.generate:openapi:minecraft: DOTNET_SKIP_FIRST_TIME_EXPERIENCE=1 DOTNET_CLI_HOME=/tmp DOTNET_CLI_TELEMETRY_OPTOUT=1 ASPNETCORE_ENVIRONMENT=OpenApi dotnet build services/minecraft/api/Nucleus.Minecraft.csproj /p:OpenApiGenerateDocumentsOnBuild=true /p:OpenApiDocumentsDirectory=$PWD/packages/minecraft-api-client --disable-build-servers
scripts.generate:openapi: bun run generate:openapi:clips && bun run generate:openapi:minecraft
scripts.generate:api-client:clips: bun run generate:openapi:clips && bun run --cwd packages/clips-api-client generate && bun run --cwd packages/clips-api-client build
scripts.generate:api-client:minecraft: bun run generate:openapi:minecraft && bun run --cwd packages/minecraft-api-client generate && bun run --cwd packages/minecraft-api-client build
scripts.generate:api-clients: bun run generate:api-client:clips && bun run generate:api-client:minecraft
scripts.check:api-client-drift: bun run generate:api-clients && git diff --exit-code -- packages/clips-api-client packages/minecraft-api-client
